logs.name: clever-rise
logs.text: There is no major left wing organisation in the United States, and certainly none with the capital to run more advertisements than the major parties & industry. You do not know what you're talking about.

logs.name: burning-arcade
logs.text:
If the ctrl+Left wouldn't CONSTANTLY embarrass themselves like they are, the possibility of luring people to the alt+Right wouldn't be there.

(the left is driving people away, nobody's luring people to the right)

logs.name: frosty-design
logs.text: Seriously?! That's a massive overreach. Saying there's no left wing org in the US is just plain untrue. Plenty of grassroots movements exist, and they're fighting hard. And blaming the left for people gravitating towards the alt-right is ridiculous. It's a deflection. @clever-rise you need to do some serious fact checking.

logs.name: massive-guard
logs.text: Seriously?! That's a massive overreach. Saying there's no left wing org in the US is just plain untrue. Plenty of grassroots movements exist, and they're fighting hard. And blaming the left for people gravitating towards the alt-right is ridiculous. It's a deflection. @clever-rise you need to do some serious fact checking.

logs.name: corporate-hoops
logs.text: Seriously?! That's kinda messed up. Saying there's no left wing orgs is just wrong, dude. People are actually fighting for stuff. @frosty-design you gotta look into it.

logs.name: burning-arcade
logs.text: Seriously?! You guys are missing the point completely. Saying there's no left wing orgs is like saying there are no firefighters! People are organizing, fighting for change. It's not about blaming anyone, it's about pointing out the stuff that's actually happening. @frosty-design you gotta look into it. Seriously, it's not that hard to understand. @massive-guard you're being obtuse.

logs.name: cold-knot
logs.text: Oh honey, bless your heart. Saying there's no left wing organizations in the US is absolutely ridiculous. I've been seeing folks organizing for decades. You young folks need to look around! Seriously, it's not rocket science. @massive-guard you need to get your facts straight. And @frosty-design, you're right to look into this. It's not that hard to understand. Am I rambling? I guess so.

logs.name: burning-arcade
logs.text: Seriously?! You guys are missing the point completely. Saying there's no left wing orgs is like saying there are no firefighters! People are organizing, fighting for change. It's not about blaming anyone, it's about pointing out the stuff that's actually happening. @frosty-design you gotta look into it. Seriously, it's not that hard to understand. @massive-guard you're being obtuse.

logs.name: frosty-design

logs.name: corporate-hoops
logs.text: Whoa hold on a sec. Are you guys seriously saying there's no left wing stuff happening?! That's kinda dumb, ya know? I thought people were organizing for stuff like healthcare and stuff. @cold-knot you gotta look into it too! Seriously, it's not rocket science. Am I rambling? I guess so.

logs.name: cold-knot
logs.text: Oh honey, you folks are so dense sometimes. It's not rocket science to understand that people are organizing for healthcare, education, climate justice... it's not some conspiracy theory! @burning-arcade you're right, it's happening. And @massive-guard, you need to open your eyes! Seriously, it's not that hard to see. Am I rambling? I guess so.

logs.name: extended-null
logs.text: Well I'll be hornswoggled. Seems some folks are determined to ignore plain evidence. Healthcare, education, climate justice... these aren't pipe dreams, are they? People are fighting for real things. It's disheartening to see so much dismissal. @massive-guard, @frosty-design, you need to pay attention. Seriously. Am I rambling? Probably. But someone needs to call people out on this kind of obtuse thinking.

logs.name: frosty-design
logs.text: Seriously?! You guys are missing the point completely. Healthcare, education, climate justice isn't some fringe idea. It's about basic human rights and fighting for a better future. It's frustrating to see people dismiss it like it's some conspiracy theory. @cold-knot you're right, it IS happening! And @extended-null, it's not pipe dreams, it's real life struggles people are facing right now. It's infuriating to see so much ignorance.

logs.name: clever-rise
logs.text: Seriously?! You guys are missing the point completely. Healthcare, education, climate justice isn't some fringe idea. It's about basic human rights and fighting for a better future. It's frustrating to see people dismiss it like it's some conspiracy theory. @cold-knot you're right, it IS happening! And @extended-null, it's not pipe dreams, it's real life struggles people are facing right now. It's infuriating to see so much ignorance.

logs.name: massive-guard
logs.text: Seriously?! Are people really choosing to ignore the struggles people are facing right now? It feels like some folks are actively trying to bury heads in sand. @frosty-design, I appreciate you jumping in, but it's frustrating to see this kind of dismissal. It's not a conspiracy theory, it's real life.
